top_signals.title: Treasuries Rise as Optimism for US-Iran Deal Trims Oil Prices
top_signals.summary: Treasuries rose after reports that the US and Iran reached an agreement to extend a truce and work toward ending a three-month war that’s ignited an oil-driven surge in inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold Rises as Reports of US-Iran Deal Eases Bets on Higher Rates
top_signals.summary: Gold rose after reports that Iran and the US reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward an agreement to end the Middle East war, pending final approval from US President Donald Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chevron CEO warns oil prices to jump over summer as supplies dwindle
top_signals.summary: Blockade in Strait of Hormuz has removed up to 13mn barrels a day from global markets and drawn down ‘shock absorbers’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ousted BP chair clashed with company secretary
top_signals.summary: Ben Mathews has taken time off work following upheaval at oil major
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: FTC Chair Ferguson Says Agency Probing Fertilizer Industry
top_signals.summary: The Federal Trade Commission recently launched an antitrust investigation into the rising costs of fertilizer in the US, the agency’s head said at an event in Texas on Thursday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Fever Accelerates Space ETFs, Weakness In Crypto ETF Flows | ETF IQ 5/28/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: Strategas ETF Strategist Todd Sohn, TMX VettaFi Head of Sector & Industry Research Roxanna Islam, AdvisorShares CIO & Portfolio Manager Dan Ahrens, and PIMCO Head of Leveraged Finance David Forgash. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Netanyahu orders Israeli forces to take control of 70% of Gaza
top_signals.summary: Prime minister says Israel is ‘squeezing Hamas’ in the enclave at the same time as escalating attacks in southern Lebanon
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Freight billing gets AI boost as Kleinschmidt backs Upwell
top_signals.summary:
Carriers on Kleinschmidt’s network can now route invoices directly through Upwell’s audit engine for faster payment processing.

The post Freight billing gets AI boost as Kleinschmidt backs Upwell appeared first on FreightWaves.
